# vpk-html

> Atlassian deck/editorial document design skill for AI agents. Built on kami's
> template-edit architecture: the LLM copies an HTML template, fills
> {{placeholders}} with real content, and ships a single offline HTML file.

## Identity

- Surface: semantic paper via `--paper` and `--paper-background` with the `image.098`-style dotted grid
- Accent: `--primary-blue` with ADS-style lime, purple, saffron, orange, navy, green, and red accents for collections, charts, diagrams, and status
- Display: Charlie Display
- Body: Charlie Text
- Mono: Atlassian Mono
- Numeric: Atlassian Mono Numeric with `unicode-range: U+0030-0039`
- Frame: 2px ink-black border + hard 1px shadow

Local font files are inlined as base64 data URIs in every template, so filled
documents are fully portable.

## Invocation

Strict — only on the literal `/vpk-html` command. Opening a Markdown file or
asking for HTML in natural language does not trigger the skill.

Optional doc-type hints: `/vpk-html resume`, `/vpk-html one-pager`,
`/vpk-html slides`.

## Capabilities

- 28 HTML document templates at assets/templates/: 8 base document shells plus
  20 Phase 2 engineering shells mapped from the html-effectiveness use-case
  catalog.
- 14 standalone SVG diagram primitives at assets/diagrams/.
- 28 demos at assets/demos/: 8 screenshot-backed showcases plus 20 restyled
  html-effectiveness demo ports.
- LLM-facing reference docs for anti-patterns, diagrams, writing,
  resume-writing, design, production, source policy, accessibility, and tokens.
- Single offline HTML output — no remote fonts, stylesheets, scripts, or images.

## Key files

- SKILL.md — Agent-facing skill manifest (kami Step 1–7 workflow)
- README.md — Human-facing introduction
- CHEATSHEET.md — Route table mapping user intent → template file
- index.html — Marketing landing page
- assets/templates/*.html — 28 offline document templates
- assets/diagrams/*.html — 14 SVG diagram primitives
- assets/demos/ — 28 curated and restyled showcase documents
- references/anti-patterns.md — 6 AI-output failure modes (consult before drafting)
- references/diagrams.md — Diagram selection guide + focal rule
- references/resume-writing.md — Resume quality bar (Action + Scope + Result + Outcome)
- references/writing.md — General prose rules + per-doc-type quality bars
- references/design.md — Visual identity rules
- references/production.md — Troubleshooting (page overflow, font issues)
- references/source-policy.md — Source attribution rules
- references/accessibility.md — Accessibility expectations
- styles.css — Shared stylesheet token map
- references/tokens.json — Programmatic token data

## Commands

- node scripts/build.mjs                            (validate all templates)
- node scripts/build.mjs --check-placeholders <file>
- node scripts/build.mjs --sync                     (validate styles.css and generated HTML mirror tokens.json)
- node scripts/build.mjs --write-styles             (regenerate styles.css from tokens.json)
- node scripts/build.mjs --check-templates
- node scripts/build.mjs --verify <file>
- node scripts/check-html.mjs <file>
- node scripts/ensure-fonts.mjs
- node scripts/port-templates.mjs                   (re-port templates from kami)
- node scripts/port-diagrams.mjs                    (re-port diagrams from kami)
- node scripts/port-demos.mjs                       (re-port kami's curated demos)
- node scripts/port-html-effectiveness.mjs          (regenerate Phase 2 engineering templates)
- node scripts/rescue-demos.mjs                     (regenerate vpk-native demos)
- node scripts/rescue-html-effectiveness-demos.mjs  (copy + restyle Phase 2 upstream demo ports)

## Workflow

```
1. Confirm /vpk-html invocation
2. Extract intent (purpose / audience / constraint / success)
3. Pick template from CHEATSHEET.md
4. Source + material pass (for branded / fact-heavy docs)
5. Distill raw content (if input is unstructured)
6. Layout note (≤80 words, transparent)
7. Copy template, fill placeholders
8. Build & verify
```

## License

Inherits the VPK-Rovo monorepo. The 8 base HTML templates and 14 diagram
primitives in assets/templates/ and assets/diagrams/ are ported from tw93/kami
(MIT) and re-skinned with vpk-html's identity. The 20 Phase 2 engineering
templates are original vpk-html shells based on the html-effectiveness use-case
catalog.
